about.title: About the Lab
about.subtitle: Veritas AI Lab is an independently engineered prototype of an enterprise-grade AI control plane, designed to exemplify scalable systems thinking for LLM deployments.
about.visionDesc: The platform provides a blueprint for managing the 'unpredictable' nature of large language models. By centralizing the request flow, enterprises can maintain rigorous oversight without sacrificing agility.
about.footer: This laboratory environment uses high-fidelity mock data and client-side calculations for demonstration purposes.
